data.name: 高塔之城的莉茲
data.detailed_description:
Liz and her mentor Aisha, are talented witches. But despite their talent, a thief manages to steal a powerful tome called the “Grimoire of Darkness” from them.

Chasing after the man, they end up near the town of Bramach. Aisha senses danger emanating from the area and orders Liz to stay behind.

However, unwilling to heed her mentor’s words, Liz heads into the town to continue her pursuit of the thief.

Features:

  • Classic RPG Experience

  • Explore an immersive fantasy world

  • Turn-based Combat

  • Crafting
data.about_the_game:
Liz and her mentor Aisha, are talented witches. But despite their talent, a thief manages to steal a powerful tome called the “Grimoire of Darkness” from them.

Chasing after the man, they end up near the town of Bramach. Aisha senses danger emanating from the area and orders Liz to stay behind.

However, unwilling to heed her mentor’s words, Liz heads into the town to continue her pursuit of the thief.

Features:

  • Classic RPG Experience

  • Explore an immersive fantasy world

  • Turn-based Combat

  • Crafting
data.short_description: After having the magical grimoire stolen, Liz and her mentor Aisha, pursue the thief to a town called Bramach. Sensing danger, Aisha tells Liz to wait for her. However, Liz decides to disregard Aisha’s order, and continues her pursuit of the thief.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
